sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_addition (a Int32, b Int32, sum Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_addition (a, b, sum) VALUES (3, 4, 3 + 4);
UPDATE test_addition SET sum = a + b WHERE a = 3 AND b = 4;
SELECT a, b, a + b AS total_sum FROM test_addition;
INSERT INTO test_addition (a, b, sum) VALUES (10, 5, 10 + 5), (8, 2, 8 + 2);
